passives.name: Eternity
passives.effects: Restore {{as|mana}} equal to 10% of {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}} taken from champions, and {{tip|heal}} for an amount equal to {{as|25% of mana spent}}, up to 20 per cast. Toggled abilities can only heal for up to 20 per second.

effects_structured.raw: Restore mana equal to 10% of pre-mitigation damage taken from champions.
Heal for 25% of mana spent, up to 20 per cast (toggles: 20 per second).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: Eternity mana restoration uses pre-mitigation champion damage only, so post-mitigation damage values should not be used for the conversion.
Player-visible behavior: Eternity healing converts 25% of mana spent with hard caps at 20 per cast and 20 per second for toggled abilities.
Page notes indicate Eternity triggers from all mana-cost sources, so non-ability mana expenditures are included unless mode/system rules explicitly override costs.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Catalyst of Aeons
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Eternity pre-mitigation damage conversion, mana-spend healing caps, toggle cap behavior, and all-mana-cost-source trigger notes
